# 20-Second Vertical Reel Storyboard

Use this template for the default `1080x1920` single-feature reel. Adjust timing
only when the campaign brief approves the exception.

## Story Contract

**Campaign ID:**

**Feature:**

**Primary benefit:**

**Primary CTA:**

**Source recording filename:**

## Timed Storyboard

| Time | Story Purpose | Product Footage / Visual | Caption / Copy | Motion / Audio |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `0:00-0:02` | Hook | Establish the need or feature context immediately | Short readable hook | Clean reveal or purposeful cut; music establishes pulse |
| `0:02-0:06` | Context | Show the real starting screen and user goal | Minimal context line if needed | Smooth crop or short zoom that settles |
| `0:06-0:10` | Feature proof 1 | Show the first important real interaction | Describe the useful action, not the click | Restrained focus treatment; subtle interaction accent |
| `0:10-0:14` | Feature proof 2 | Show the real result or next useful interaction | Reinforce the result | Clean transition; keep UI readable |
| `0:14-0:18` | Benefit | Hold or reframe the strongest proof | Resolve the hook with the primary benefit | Let the result settle; reduce motion |
| `0:18-0:20` | CTA | Official logo, approved CTA, `dein-dein.com` | One CTA only | Gentle logo reveal; stable for at least `1.5 seconds` |

## Shot List

| Shot | Source In/Out or Description | Required Crop | Purpose | Approved |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | | | Hook/context | |
| 2 | | | Feature proof | |
| 3 | | | Feature proof/result | |
| 4 | | | Benefit | |
| 5 | Closing brand frame | Full vertical frame | CTA | |

## Review Questions

- [ ] Is the hook readable within the first two seconds?
- [ ] Does the storyboard show real product behavior rather than describing it
      abstractly?
- [ ] Is the audience benefit clear by `0:18`?
- [ ] Can the full story be understood without audio?
- [ ] Is every proposed crop, zoom, caption, and transition purposeful?
- [ ] Is the final frame stable for at least `1.5 seconds`?
- [ ] Is the CTA approved by the campaign brief and brand guide?
